title: IT Certification Website

title: Medical Test

title: GlucoGuide
description: Created a health monitoring platform with 2FA authentication, daily health tracking, and a machine learning model to estimate diabetes risk percentage.

title: Sharjah Mawsalat
description: Built a UAE bus transportation app with route visualization, stop and fare details, and location-based route planning on interactive maps.

title: BizNews

title: Upstore
description: Implemented product browsing, filtering, secure authentication, checkout flow, and order management for an online store.
